---
pagetitle: "Raphael Ludwig"
page-layout: custom
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
include-before-body: assets/html/particles-embed.html
include-after-body: assets/html/particles-scripts.html
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-inner}

# Raphael Ludwig

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Quantitative Economist — Macro Research & Applied Econometrics
:::

Forecasting, nowcasting, and applied macro-econometrics — rigorous, reproducible
replications of central-bank and academic empirical work, built on public data.

::: {.hero-cta}
[Browse Exercises →](exercises/index.qmd){.btn-hero .btn-primary}
[Download CV →](cv/cv.pdf){.btn-hero .btn-outline}
:::

:::
:::
